title: Echi gold plated loud service/hand/alarm bell (metal)
features: Retro style design, lovely gold hand bell with black wooden handle, iron gold plated. Dimensions (HxD) approx. 5.1 in x 2.9 in. Weight: approx. 105g.
The handheld bell makes sound thanks to the spring with a metal ball inside that gives a crisp, loud ring. You can hear it over the sound of TV or other household noise.

Big restaurant service, signals that dinner is ready. It can also be used to train pets, call you into a room, for games, or for a person to call for help. Can also be used as a hand-held school bell. You will receive a group of attention.

Raises a loud clear alarm for those who are bed ridden and may need help, so that they feel safe and secure in an emergency. It lets nurses or family members know that you need help in a dignified manner and without the need for crying.
This gold hand bell is really the best jingle bell for a Christmas toy. Can also be used as a wedding event decoration.
description: Product description Big school house hand bell with a vintage style design for calling for attention: These small call bell is the perfect addition to a classroom or reception desk. Whenever you need to get the attention of anyone, this golden hand bell will help you. Useful in emergency situations: ideal for people with mobility and a must for anyone who is bed ridden. Top quality. Colour: golden. Material: iron. Length: 13 cm. Bell diameter: 7.5 cm. Weight: 0.105 kg. Uses: service/emergency/call bells, decoration. Echi devotes all products and service problems and is committed to protecting an excellent experience for all buyers. Our priority is to provide you the best quality. - - Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. This product contains small parts that may pose a choking hazard. Do not use if the bell or handle is damaged or broken. Always supervise children when using this product. Do not use near open flames or heat sources. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat.
